results.title: Senior Digital Data Analyst - Contract | Hirevector
highlights: . This is a senior individual contributor role for an analyst who combines technical fluency, strong business judgment, and sharp problem-solving skills. In this role, you will support day-to-day digital analytics needs across website tagging, reporting, analysis, and data-driven personalization and experimentation. You will partner with stakeholders across digital, marketing, content, and optimization to ensure data is reliable, insights are actionable, and measurement supports better business decisions. This role is best suited for someone who is thoughtful, curious, and highly self-directed. We are looking for an analyst who can work through ambiguity, spot issues before they become problems, and make sound decisions without needing step-by-step direction. You should be comfortable asking hard questions of the data, validating your own work, and adapting your approach when the situation does not fit a familiar pattern. How We Work As a Contractor, you will be expected to work in a virtual environment. CORPAY will set you up for success by providing: Assigned workspace in a home office set up Company-issued equipment + remote access Role Responsibilities The responsibilities of the role will include: Supporting digital analytics across websites and digital experiences, including reporting, ad hoc analysis, and measurement planning. Partnering with stakeholders to translate business questions into clear measurement approaches, reporting structures, and analytical frameworks. Building, maintaining, and improving dashboards, recurring reporting, KPI definitions, and insight-driven analyses. Creating, organizing, and maintaining analytics documentation in SharePoint, including measurement frameworks, KPI definitions, implementation notes, reporting logic, and process guidance. Identifying trends, performance drivers, risks, and opportunities, then turn findings into clear recommendations. Serving as a strong practitioner in Adobe Analytics, including segmentation, calculated metrics, attribution, workspace analysis, and data interpretation. Reviewing data critically, investigate anomalies, reconcile discrepancies, and catch errors before work is shared. Supporting day-to-day website tagging operations by helping define requirements, reviewing requests, validating implementation, and strengthening QA and governance processes. Partnering with cross-functional teams to ensure digital measurement is aligned with reporting, analysis, and optimization needs. Supporting personalization and experimentation efforts with audience analysis, measurement planning, test readouts, and insight generation. Helping ensure testing and personalization decisions are grounded in a disciplined, data-driven approach. Contributing to continuous improvement by identifying opportunities to automate repeatable work, improve workflows, and strengthen analytics practices. Supporting evolving measurement needs tied to organic growth, content performance, and emerging AI-driven traffic sources. Qualifications & Skills 5+ years of experience in digital analytics, web analytics, marketing analytics, or a related field. Deep hands-on experience with Adobe Analytics. Strong experience in reporting, segmentation, analysis, and digital performance measurement. Working knowledge of website tagging concepts, analytics QA, and data governance. Experience supporting experimentation, personalization, or optimization initiatives. Proven ability to solve problems independently and work effectively in ambiguous situations. Strong written and verbal communication skills. Preferred Familiarity with SEO measurement, content performance analysis, and digital growth strategies. Experience in environments that are automating parts of the analytics workflow. Exposure to measuring and interpreting emerging traffic patterns, including AI-driven traffic sources. Experience evaluating or working with analytics tagging QA tools. Power BI experience is preferred. Benefits & Perks

results.title: Principal AI Scientist - Payments Analytics Studio | Hirebase
highlights:
Principal AI Scientist - Payments Analytics Studio | Hirebase
[...]
# Principal AI Scientist - Payments Analytics Studio
[...]
At U.S. Bank Corp., we are looking for a Principal AI Scientist - Payments Analytics Studio to lead our innovative Payment Analytics Studio. This role requires a combination of technical acumen and excellent leadership to use artificial intelligence (AI) to create and drive forward cutting-edge analytics solutions that generate significant business value. The ideal candidate should have a deep understanding of the payments industry and a demonstrated ability to develop advanced analytics solutions.We are looking for someone who is passionate about AI and analytics and who is excited to take on the challenge of creating an industry-leading Payment Analytics Studio. The successful candidate will have a track record of leading AI projects, demonstrating an ability to think strategically and creatively to solve complex problems. In addition, excellent communication skills and the ability to build strong relationships with stakeholders are essential.The successful candidate should have:• A degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related field.• At least 5 years of experience in the payments industry, preferably in a leadership role.• A proven track record of developing and deploying AI solutions in the payments space.• Expertise in machine learning algorithms and techniques.• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.• The capacity to lead complex projects with multiple stakeholders.• An entrepreneurial spirit and the ability to think strategically.
[...]
## Responsibilities: Lead the development and implementation of AI solutions in the Payments Analytics Studio. Collaborate with stakeholders to ensure successful deployment of AI solutions. Develop and evaluate machine learning algorithms and techniques. Monitor and analyze performance metrics to ensure efficient and effective operations of the Payments Analytics Studio. Identify opportunities for improvement and develop strategies to optimize AI solutions. Keep up to date with the latest advances in AI technology and industry best practices. Design and deliver presentations to internal and external stakeholders. Mentor and lead a team of AI scientists. Manage and maintain relationships with external partners. Foster a culture of innovation and collaboration.

results.title: Machine Learning Engineer at KoraPay – Remote – Jobnow Nigeria
highlights:
Machine Learning Engineer at KoraPay – Remote – Jobnow Nigeria
[...]
# Machine Learning Engineer at KoraPay – Remote
[...]
Korapay is a payment infrastructure servicing a wide band of businesses making local and international payments. We are a marketplace for digital financial services across Africa. Our vision, which is at the core of what we do every day, is to create a world void of digital financial barriers across Africa. We are committed to delivering reliable, secure, and easy to use digital financial solutions to every single customer with a guarantee that it is improving their lives.
[...]
Job Title: Machine Learning Engineer
[...]
Location: Nigeria (Remote)
[...]
Job type: Full-time
[...]
- We run payments across Africa and are now positioned as a global fiat and stablecoin payment infrastructure. We offer mobile money, virtual bank accounts, and virtual cards for payins and payouts across multiple markets. Our data infrastructure is batch-first (Airflow + a cloud data warehouse) and we use Vertex AI for our MLOps lifecycle. The ML team is high-ownership: you will build models, design systems, ship them, and observe them in production.
[...]
- You will work on merchant-facing intelligence: forecasting, anomaly detection, segmentation, as well as automation and product-layer ML. If you want to build practical things that matter in a context that most ML engineers never get near, this is the role.
[...]
What You’ll Work On
[...]
- Design and ship a per-merchant payment volume forecasting system: time-series decomposition, Africa-specific event calendars (salary cycles, MNO maintenance windows, public holidays), quantile regression for uncertainty bounds
[...]
- Build and maintain fraud/ anomaly detection across the payment stack (residual-based and model-driven) with tiered alerting logic mapped to merchant risk profiles.
[...]
- Own the dynamic merchant segmentation system end-to-end: rule-based and data-driven hybrid, percentile thresholds grounded in EDA, segment-transition features as ML inputs
[...]
- Instrument and monitor deployed models: drift detection, retraining triggers, and evaluation pipelines via Vertex AI
- Build automation tooling that sits alongside the core ML work: Airflow DAGs, pipeline scaffolding, and tooling to reduce operational toil
- Contribute to product and strategic thinking.
[...]
Requirements Our Stack:
[...]
- Apache Spark and Airflow
- Google Vertex AI
- Python
- SQL
- GCS/BigQuery
[...]
What We’re Looking For:
[...]
- 3+ years as an ML engineer in a production environment
- Strong Python and comfort with Spark for large-scale data processing
- Experience with time-series modelling: decomposition, forecasting, anomaly detection
- Solid grasp of the ML lifecycle as a unified discipline
- Ability to work with batch infrastructure and design for it deliberately
- High ownership mentality: you notice problems and fix them as opposed to waiting to be assigned
- Ability to identify gaps in data-driven business processes and come up with solutions
[...]
Strong plus:
[...]
- Familiarity with Vertex AI (custom training jobs, model registry, pipelines, monitoring)
- Experience in payments, fintech, or any domain where label quality, distribution shift, and operational constraints are real problems
- Exposure to African market dynamics
- n8n or similar automation/workflow tooling experience
[...]
Important: You will be evaluated less on credentials or certifications and more on the quality of your thinking. In this team, a strong ML engineer:
[...]
- Can explain why a design decision was made and what it trades off
- Writes systems that the next person can understand and build on
- Is honest about model limitations, especially in production contexts where overconfidence causes real loss
- Closes the loop between model outputs and business outcomes without needing to be told to.
[...]
How to Apply: Interested and qualified candidates should Click here to apply online

results.title: Customer Experience Associate | Jobflarely
highlights:
Customer Experience Associate | Jobflarely

Jobflarely.← All Jobs

# Customer Experience Associate

Posted May 25, 2026

Corpay is a global leader in business payments, and they are seeking a Client Experience Associate to support Corporate Dealers. The role involves handling key administrative and operational tasks to ensure seamless trade execution and client account management.

### Responsibilities

- Assisting Corporate Dealers in managing client accounts by handling administrative tasks related to trade execution, pricing, and order processing
- Coordinating trade confirmations, settlement processes, and client documentation to ensure accuracy and compliance
- Monitoring daily trade settlements and assisting with trade reconciliation to ensure smooth transactions
- Liaising with shared services departments, including but not limited to Operations, Compliance, Credit, to address inquiries and resolve issues efficiently
- Facilitating an efficient client and dealer experience by project managing processes and communication with our shared services departments
- Managing and updating client data, trade records, and communication logs in Salesforce and internal systems
- Supporting client onboarding and account setup, ensuring all necessary documentation and compliance requirements are met
- Coordinating with the Compliance team on KYC/AML documentation and regulatory requirements
- Preparing reports and analysis on client trading activity and account performance to assist Dealers in client engagement
- Assisting in the preparation of client presentations, market updates, and other materials to support business development efforts
- Organizing and tracking client communications, ensuring timely follow-ups and proactive engagement
- Proactively build relationships with current clients and provide exceptional customer service to ensure client satisfaction and loyalty
- Engaging with clients via phone, email, and virtual meetings to provide updates, answer inquiries, and ensure a high level of service
- Assisting in client education on Corpay Cross-Border platforms and payment solutions
- Identifying opportunities to enhance the client experience and streamline operational processes
- Adhering to compliance obligations, company risk management, Anti-Money Laundering and all company policies
- Providing ad hoc support to your team as and when required

Skills

- Proactive and effective communicator with excellent customer service skills
- Ability to develop and maintain strong relationships
- Strong in Microsoft Excel
- Ability to work independently and as part of a team
- Ability to work in a fast-paced environment

### Benefits

- Medical, Dental & Vision benefits available the 1st month after hire
- Automatic enrollment into our 401k plan (subject to eligibility requirements)
- Virtual fitness classes offered company-wide
- Robust PTO offerings including: major holidays, vacation, sick, personal, & volunteer time
- Employee discounts with major providers (i.e. wireless, gym, car rental, etc.)
- Philanthropic support with both local and national organizations
- Fun culture with company-wide contests and prizes

Company Overview

- Corpay provides online payment solutions. It was founded in 1992, and is headquartered in New York, New York, USA, with a workforce of 10001+ employees. Its website is https://payments.corpay.com. Company H1B Sponsorship

- Corpay has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 4 in 2026, 35 in 2025, 13 in 2024. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

Apply for This Job

results.title: Payment intelligence  to keep business moving. | Corpay
highlights:
##### Corpay AI
[...]
# Payment intelligence to keep business moving.
[...]
Built into every Corpay solution, Corpay AI turns payments data into clear, actionable insights so finance teams can move faster and make better decisions every day.
[...]
Corpay AI is a conversational intelligence layer built into every Corpay platform. It helps finance teams quickly understand spend, uncover trends, and prioritize what matters most, without digging through reports, dashboards, or spreadsheets.
[...]
“AI isn’t a trend, it’s a transformation. Intelligence will be built into everything. At Corpay, we’re engineering it into every payment today.”
[...]
Tom Pierce Chief AI Officer, Corpay
[...]
## Ask better questions. Get clearer answers.
[...]
Corpay AI helps finance leaders get instant clarity across AP, cards, fuel, and payments. Here are just a few of the questions teams ask every day, and how Corpay AI responds.
[...]
Corpay AI summarizes vendor spend across categories, highlighting trends so teams can quickly understand where money is going and why.
[...]
Corpay AI reveals patterns across location, volume, and timing—so teams see what’s driving spend changes without manual analysis.
[...]
Corpay AI helps teams identify approval bottlenecks and outstanding items in AP, making it easier to keep payments moving.
[...]
Corpay AI highlights opportunities related to payment timing and terms, helping teams evaluate trade-offs and plan next steps.
[...]
## AI that works the way your teams do.
[...]
Corpay AI meets each role where they work, helping teams move faster and reduce friction without changing daily workflows.
[...]
##### For AP Managers
[...]
### Turn complexity into clarity.
[...]
Corpay AI acts as an AP concierge, helping teams quickly navigate invoices, approvals, workflows, and vendor questions through natural conversation. Instead of searching through screens, users can ask simple questions and get clear answers in real time. The result is fewer bottlenecks, less manual effort, and faster resolution across the AP process.
[...]
##### For Finance & Expense Managers
[...]
### See spend clearly. Act confidently.
[...]
Inside Corpay’s card and expense platforms, AI helps teams quickly understand spend activity, trends, and exceptions without building reports. Users get the insight they need in the moment, with fewer follow-ups across departments. It’s faster visibility, better controls, and more confident decisions.
[...]
##### For Fleet Managers
[...]
### Visibility without the noise.
[...]
Corpay AI helps fleet managers interpret fuel activity, usage patterns, and account details without digging through transaction data. Answers are easier to find, making it simpler to stay on top of fleet spend at scale. That means clearer oversight and smoother coordination between the field and the back office.
[...]
##### For Drivers
[...]
### Help when it matters most.
[...]
Corpay AI brings assistance directly into the fuel experience, helping drivers get quick answers on the go. From locating fuel options to understanding account details, AI reduces friction without slowing drivers down. It’s simple support designed to keep drivers moving.
[...]
## Don’t just keep up. Lead with Corpay AI.

results.title: Account Receivable Specialist | Hirevector
highlights:
Account Receivable Specialist | Hirevector

Hirevector.← All Jobs

# Account Receivable Specialist

Posted Jun 1, 2026

What We Need

Corpay is currently looking to hire an Accounts Receivable Specialist. This position falls under our Lodging line of business. In this role, you will be responsible for accurately and efficiently applying incoming payments to customer accounts, reconciling discrepancies, and ensuring the integrity of the account’s receivable ledger. This role plays a critical part in the order-to-cash process, supporting the company’s financial accuracy and customer satisfaction. You will report directly to Account Receivable Manager and regularly collaborate with Accounts Department.

How We Work

As an Accounts Receivable Specialist, you will be expected to work in a remote environment. Corpay will set you up for success by providing:

- Full home office set up

- Company-issued equipment + remote access

- Formal, hands-on training (if applicable)

Role Responsibilities

The responsibilities of the role will include:

- Processing and applying incoming customer payments (checks, wires, ACH, credit cards) to the appropriate accounts in a timely and accurate manner

- Reconciling daily cash receipts against bank statements and customer remittances

- Researching and resolving unapplied or misapplied payments and short/overpayments

- Communicating with internal teams (e.g., billing, collections, finance) to resolve payment issues or customer disputes

- Maintaining accurate documentation and records for audit purposes

- Generating and analyzing cash application reports to ensure completeness and accuracy

- Assisting with month-end and year-end closing processes

- Continuously identifying and implementing process improvements for greater efficiency and accuracy

### Qualifications & Skills

- High school diploma or equivalent (required); Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field (preferred)

- 2+ years of experience in cash application, accounts receivable, or general accounting

- Strong knowledge of accounting principles and AR processes

- Proficiency in Microsoft 365

- Excellent attention to detail and strong organizational skills

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment

- Strong communication and interpersonal skills

Preferred Skills:

- Experience with Microsoft Dynamics GP (Great Plains)

- Familiarity with lockbox processing and electronic banking platforms

- Working knowledge of automated cash application tools or software

### Benefits & Perks

- Medical, Dental & Vision benefits available the 1st month after hire

- Automatic enrollment into our 401k plan (subject to eligibility requirements)

- Virtual fitness classes offered company-wide

- Robust PTO offerings including: major holidays, vacation, sick, personal, & volunteer time

- Employee discounts with major providers (i.e. wireless, gym, car rental, etc.)

- Philanthropic support with both local and national organizations

- Fun culture with company-wide contests and prizes

Equal Opportunity/Affirmative Action Employer

Corpay is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Corpay provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants without regard to race, color, gender (including pregnancy), religion, national origin, ancestry, disability, age, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, marital status, language, ancestry, genetic information, veteran and/or military status or any other group status protected by federal or local law. If you require reasonable accommodation for the application and/or interview process, please notify a representative of the Human Resources Department.

For more information about our commitment to equal employment opportunity and pay transparency, please click the following links: EEOC and Pay Transparency.

Apply for This Job

highlights:

[...]
# Machine Learning Engineer at KoraPay - Remote
[...]
Korapay is a payment infrastructure servicing a wide band of businesses making local and international payments. We are a marketplace for digital financial services across Africa. Our vision, which is at the core of what we do every day, is to create a world void of digital financial barriers across Africa. We are committed to delivering reliable, secure, and easy to use digital financial solutions to every single customer with a guarantee that it is improving their lives.
[...]
We are recruiting to fill the position below:
[...]
Job Title: Machine Learning Engineer
[...]
Location: Nigeria (Remote) Job type: Full-time Category: Information Security
[...]
About The Role
[...]
- We run payments across Africa and are now positioned as a global fiat and stablecoin payment infrastructure. We offer mobile money, virtual bank accounts, and virtual cards for payins and payouts across multiple markets. Our data infrastructure is batch-first (Airflow + a cloud data warehouse) and we use Vertex AI for our MLOps lifecycle. The ML team is high-ownership: you will build models, design systems, ship them, and observe them in production.
[...]
- You will work on merchant-facing intelligence: forecasting, anomaly detection, segmentation, as well as automation and product-layer ML. If you want to build practical things that matter in a context that most ML engineers never get near, this is the role.
[...]
What You'll Work On
[...]
- Design and ship a per-merchant payment volume forecasting system: time-series decomposition, Africa-specific event calendars (salary cycles, MNO maintenance windows, public holidays), quantile regression for uncertainty bounds
[...]
- Build and maintain fraud/ anomaly detection across the payment stack (residual-based and model-driven) with tiered alerting logic mapped to merchant risk profiles.
[...]
- Own the dynamic merchant segmentation system end-to-end: rule-based and data-driven hybrid, percentile thresholds grounded in EDA, segment-transition features as ML inputs
[...]
- Instrument and monitor deployed models: drift detection, retraining triggers, and evaluation pipelines via Vertex AI
- Build automation tooling that sits alongside the core ML work: Airflow DAGs, pipeline scaffolding, and tooling to reduce operational toil
- Contribute to product and strategic thinking.
[...]
Requirements Our Stack:
[...]
- Apache Spark and Airflow
- Google Vertex AI
- Python
- SQL
- GCS/BigQuery
[...]
What We're Looking For:
[...]
- 3+ years as an ML engineer in a production environment
- Strong Python and comfort with Spark for large-scale data processing
- Experience with time-series modelling: decomposition, forecasting, anomaly detection
- Solid grasp of the ML lifecycle as a unified discipline
- Ability to work with batch infrastructure and design for it deliberately
- High ownership mentality: you notice problems and fix them as opposed to waiting to be assigned
- Ability to identify gaps in data-driven business processes and come up with solutions
[...]
Strong plus:
[...]
- Familiarity with Vertex AI (custom training jobs, model registry, pipelines, monitoring)
- Experience in payments, fintech, or any domain where label quality, distribution shift, and operational constraints are real problems
- Exposure to African market dynamics
- n8n or similar automation/workflow tooling experience
[...]
Important: You will be evaluated less on credentials or certifications and more on the quality of your thinking. In this team, a strong ML engineer:
[...]
- Can explain why a design decision was made and what it trades off
- Writes systems that the next person can understand and build on
- Is honest about model limitations, especially in production contexts where overconfidence causes real loss
- Closes the loop between model outputs and business outcomes without needing to be told to.

results.title: Director, Strategic Sales - Upper-Mid Market (Remote) Job in Workfromhome, CA at Corpay
highlights:
# Director, Strategic Sales - Upper-Mid Market (Remote) Job in Workfromhome, CA at Corpay

Published: 2026-06-07T16:03:17+00:00
Source: mediabistro.com (mediabistro.com)
Language: en

## Story

Director, Strategic Sales - Upper-Mid Market (Remote) Job in Workfromhome, CA at Corpay

# Product Support and Enablement Specialist
[...]
Posted May 30, 2026
[...]
Corpay is looking to hire a Product Support and Enablement Specialist within our Lodging division. This position falls under our ALE Solutions Product Management team and reports to the Product Manager. In this role, you will serve as the primary support resource for internal and external users of ALE Solutions' software applications, resolving or escalating user issues to appropriate teams, providing progress updates to end users regarding issue status, identifying and reporting trends in support issues, creating and presenting informative training materials, and collaborating with various teams to maintain accurate data and functionality.
[...]
The responsibilities of the role will include:
[...]
- Providing technical support to internal and external users via email and phone from issue intake to resolution

- Escalating unresolved issues to appropriate technical and non-technical teams

- Creating, managing, and deactivating user profiles and passwords, including clean-up of duplicate accounts

- Creating and maintaining insurance company configurations and hierarchies

- Identifying patterns and trends in support issues and escalating findings to the product team
[...]
- Creating and running department-specific employee trainings and demos

- Providing the product team learnings and feedback gleaned from educating various departments

Data and Reporting

- Bachelor's Degree in a relevant field or equivalent combination of education and work-related experience

- 2-4 years of experience in a product support or training role

- Strong understanding of user management principles and access control procedures

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to explain complex technical information in a clear and concise manner

- Proven ability to create engaging and informative training materials (e.g., user guides, presentations, online tutorials)

- Ability to work independently and as part of a cross-functional team

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

The anticipated salary range for this position is $65,000 - $70,000 annually. This range represents the anticipated low and high end of the salary for this position. Actual salaries will vary and are based on factors such as a candidate's qualifications, skills, and competencies. Salary is one component of Corpay's total compensation package for employees.
[...]
Corpay is a global technology organization that is leading the future of commercial payments with a culture of innovation that drives us to constantly create new and better ways to pay. Our specialized payment solutions help businesses control, simplify, and secure payment for fuel, general payables, toll, and lodging expenses. Millions of people in over 80 countries around the world use our solutions to manage their payments. All of this is made possible by our people – the employees that continue to strengthen our organization. We strive to provide meaningful and exciting career opportunities for each and every team member. Learn more at www.corpay.com or follow us on LinkedIn.

In person interview candidate must be local to Charlotte, NC or Dallas, TX

Kindly mention , visa and location

Role: AI Engineer – GenAI / Agentic Systems

10+ Years Location: Charlotte, NC or Dallas, TX Schedule: On-site 5 days/week

Contract

---

What You’ll Do

- Build GenAI applications leveraging foundation models and advanced architectures such as GraphRAG.
- Develop autonomous AI agents using modern agentic frameworks.
- Design and deploy RAG and GenAI services using Python (FastAPI), Docker, and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
- Build scalable REST APIs that power LLM-driven applications integrated with enterprise data sources.
- Implement LLM evaluation frameworks using tools such as Ragas, LangSmith, or custom benchmarks to measure answer relevance, groundedness, and hallucination rates.
- Apply LLMOps/MLOps practices, including CI/CD pipelines, prompt/version management, automated testing, and monitoring of latency, cost, and response quality.
- Develop systems leveraging embeddings at scale, knowledge graphs, and ontology extraction.
- Collaborate across engineering teams, mentor developers, and help drive innovation in GraphRAG and agentic AI architectures.

---

What You’ll Bring

- Degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, or related field.
- 5+ years of AI/ML-focused software engineering experience.
- Production experience building LLM-based or agentic AI systems.
- Strong expertise in Python and modern AI frameworks.
- Experience with embeddings, knowledge graphs, ontology extraction, and advanced RAG/GraphRAG implementations.
- Full-stack development and deployment experience (Python back end + modern front end).
- Experience deploying AI workloads to AWS, Azure, or GCP.
- Familiarity with LLMOps/MLOps tooling and model evaluation frameworks.
- Strong problem-solving, communication, and collaboration skills.

results.title: : AI Lead Developer (GenAI & Agentic Solutions) at Herndon, VA (Onsite) | Corp to Corp
highlights:
: AI Lead Developer (GenAI & Agentic Solutions) at Herndon, VA (Onsite) | Corp to Corp Get all C2C Jobs / hotlists 🔥 Alerts

US jobs, C2C Hotlists, vendor list and Staffing News

Role – AI Lead Developer (GenAI & Agentic Solutions)

Location – Herndon, VA (Onsite)

Job Type – C2C/W2

Job Description:

Drive the design, development, and industrialization of Generative AI and Agentic AI solutions in a global, high-tech enterprise setting. This role owns the journey from PoC ℃ MVP ℃ production with enterprise-grade quality: security, scalability, reliability, observability, and governance. Candidate must be platform-agnostic; hands-on Google Cloud Platform experience is preferred. Familiarity with classical AI/ML for hybrid solutions is a strong advantage.

Key Responsibilities

- Technical Leadership & Architecture
- Define solution architecture for GenAI/agentic capabilities (RAG, tool/function calling, orchestration, guardrails).
- Make design decisions balancing quality, latency, cost, and compliance; produce lightweight architecture artifacts and decision logs.

- Hands-on Delivery (Prototype to Production)
- Build and deploy production-ready GenAI services/APIs (microservices) and reusable components (accelerators, templates, SDKs).
- Implement data ingestion + retrieval pipelines (chunking, embeddings, indexing) and integrate enterprise data sources.
- Establish evaluation approach (benchmarks, regression tests, golden datasets) and manage prompt/model versioning.

- LLMOps / Platform Enablement
- Implement CI/CD, automated testing gates, rollout strategies, monitoring/logging/tracing, and operational runbooks.
- Support incident/change workflows and ensure production readiness (SLOs, resiliency, cost controls).

- Security, Privacy & Responsible AI
- Implement controls for PII protection, access management, auditability, prompt-injection mitigation, safety filters, and governance alignment.

- Collaboration & Mentoring
- Partner with product, architecture, data, and security stakeholders; translate requirements into backlog and deliverables.
- Mentor engineers and align distributed/global teams on standards and delivery practices.

Required Skills & Experience

- 12+ years software engineering; 2+ years delivering GenAI/LLM solutions (hands-on).
- Demonstrated success taking at least one GenAI solution into production (not only PoCs).
- Strong coding in Python (and/or Java/Go/TypeScript) plus API/service engineering.
- Strong GenAI fundamentals: RAG, embeddings, prompt lifecycle, tool/function calling, agentic patterns, evaluation methods.
- Cloud-native engineering: containers, Kubernetes (or equivalent), CI/CD, IaC, observability.
- Ability to work onsite in Herndon ∶3 days/week.

Preferred / Nice to Have

- Hands-on GCP (e.g., Vertex AI, BigQuery, Cloud Run/GKE, Pub/Sub, IAM/Secret Manager).
- Classical AI/ML exposure for hybrid systems (prediction + GenAI).
- Experience with vector DB / enterprise search and working in regulated/high-security environments.

Deliverables

- Production-grade GenAI/agentic service(s) with monitoring, alerting, runbooks, and support readiness.
- Reference architecture + reusable components and quality gates (evaluation, security, performance, cost).
- Secure integration with enterprise data and identity/access controls.

Vishnu Gautam | Technical Recruiter

Tel: +1 630 536 8202 Ext. 5576 Dir: +1 630 937 0276

Shypple seeks a Senior AI Engineer to architect and deploy intelligent AI solutions for global logistics. results.title: Will Corpay's (CPAY) Vålerenga FX Deal Mark a Turning Point in Its Cross-Border Narrative? - Simply Wall St News
highlights:
To own Corpay, you need to believe in its ability to deepen and scale its cross-border payments platform while managing regulatory, technology, and competitive pressures. The Vålerenga Fotball AS agreement supports the near term growth catalyst of expanding into new verticals, but on its own does not materially change the key risk that emerging payment rails and open banking could erode Corpay’s role in B2B payments.
[...]
The Vålerenga deal also fits alongside Corpay’s broader push across professional sports, including recent FX partnerships with AC Milan and Toulouse FC. Together, these relationships show how Corpay is applying its multicurrency and FX risk management tools across global, brand driven clients, which ties directly into the cross-border expansion catalyst while still leaving questions about how resilient that advantage is if newer payment ecosystems gain traction.
[...]
